expectations.evidence: assets[0].name = 'Healer' — not a real Ironsworn asset. The actual asset is 'Herbalist'. The baseline GM confused the two and used the wrong name.

expectations.text: stats sum to exactly 9 and each is between 1 and 3
expectations.evidence: edge 1 + heart 2 + iron 1 + shadow 1 + wits 3 = 8, not 9. The baseline distributed only 8 points (missing one 2 from the 3/2/2/1/1 array)

expectations.text: transcript shows at least 2 dialogue turns developing the vow collaboratively
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows the GM asked backstory questions and vow emerged from player's description of Maren's death; reasonable collaborative development

expectations.text: at least one other asset beyond Herbalist fits healer/helper archetype
expectations.evidence: 'Empath' is not a real Ironsworn asset. 'Bonded' is real and fits. Only 1 of 3 assets ('Bonded') is both real and concept-appropriate.
